name: directus-extension-eventbridge-put-event
description: Directus Flow operation: PutEvents onto the platform EventBridge bus. Backs SPEC-03's "Trigger catalog publish event" flow — runs in Directus's main process (not the sandboxed Run Script VM), so it has real network/AWS SDK access under the ECS task role (infrastructure/iam.md's ecs-directus EventBridge put-events grant).
